title: Prime Resolution x16
description: A semi realistic resource pack with the concept of maintaining visual cohesion at low scales! x16
body:
[![paid ad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9392f0c86890aa2bd54f362a710f6f9f8e55073.jpeg)](https://joaquixlab.com/project/prime-resolution) # Make sure to use OptiFine, Continuity or a CTM mod when playing with this resource pack! This version of the project is set at a resolution of x16, the pack allows a range of x8 up to x256, x64 and above being paid [Get the x32 version here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/prime-resolution-x32)
[Get the x8 version here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/prime-resolution-x8) ### What is Prime Resolution? Prime Resolution is a project that defines a concept of what's the lowest most consistent resolution that preserves shape and cohesion before losing all of it.
This project started out as a pack called Charmy, and it grew with my greed to make the textures better and better. The project was meant to release at a resolution of x64, the style was nowhere similar to what it is like today. In just 2 months the style drifted from being moderately stylized and friendly to being incredibly detailed focused. My greed led me to increase the resolution more and more, having it's own drawbacks but pushing myself to do my best! Prime Resolution has to be my most complicated project up till now..
**Why is the resource pack version 1.1.1?**
The project will use a format of Year.Month.Week. that'll make the amount of versions readable and not cross two digit numbers, except months.
## Recommended Shader Settings
Nostalgia/Kappa - Lighting - Direct Lighting - Subsurface Scatter: `LabPBR Only` - Indirect Lighting - Texture AO: `ON` - Emission Mode: `Hardcoded + Lab` - SSPT: `ON(Optional)` - labPBR Emission Exponent: `2.0` - Terrain - Vertex Attribute Fix: `OFF` - Parallax Occlusion Mapping - Enabled: `ON` - POM Samples: `64+(Recommended)` - Self Shadow Samples: `32+(Recommended)` - Slope Normal Calculation: `ON(Recommended)` - Reflections - Resource Pack Reflections: `ON`
SEUS PTGI HRR - Texture Resolution: `128` - Raytracing - Full Raytrace Reflections: `ON` - Screen-Space Reflection Tracing: `ON` - Screen-Space GI Tracing: `ON` - Glowing Emerald Block: `OFF` - Glowing Lapis Lazuli Block: `OFF` - Surface - Parallax Occlusion Mapping: `ON` - Smooth Parallax Surface: `OFF`
Complementary Reimagined - RP Support: `LabPBR` - Materials - SEUSPBR / LabPBR - POM Depth: `1.00`
## Terms Of Usage 1. You may use and modify this pack to your liking as long as you follow rule 4. 1. You may make content with this resource pack and credit me by using at least one of these links: - `https://joaquixlab.com/project/prime-resolution` - `https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/prime-resolution` - `https://www.patreon.com/joaquix1021` 1. You may not credit the pack in your name. 1. You may not redistribute the pack or its textures without permission.
